description: Forms an idea can take at a specific stage in the timeline.

values.name: Constitutive
values.use_when: the idea is architecturally central at that stage.

values.name: Diagnostic
values.use_when: the idea is used to diagnose a problem or contradiction.

values.name: Historical Precondition
values.use_when: the idea mainly names background historical conditions.

values.name: Background Assumption
values.use_when: the idea is presupposed rather than argued.

values.name: Absent
values.use_when: the idea is missing or not yet operative.

values.name: Retired
values.use_when: the idea was active earlier but is later dropped.
